## **2.3.3 ATCO Planning 1**

### **Additional comments**

### **Additional comments**

### **Description of the training process, including details on the effective failure rate and the process used to allocate newly qualified ATCOs between ACC, APP and TWR positions**

Training processes are strictly following EU2015/340 standards and local regulatons. Allocation between ACC/APP and TWR is perfomed based on actual demand ans staffing situation. The failure rate on the OJT phase is normally 0 due to possibility to re-allocate trainees to the position with less complexity
